title: acer monspessulanum f. ibericum
intro: Acer monspessulanum f. ibericum, also known as the Iberian Maple or Mountain Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species native to the Mediterranean region. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, providing health benefits such as reduced pain, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Acer monspessulanum f. ibericum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
